The Engagement Gap

Get the solution to your engagement problem

Whether you need to grow your fan loyalty, grow your online community, prove your sponsorship value, or drive engagement at your event — Fancard has you covered.

Before Fancard
The problems you face today
✕
Moments disappear after the event

Fans go home with no digital touchpoint — their energy and intent lost forever.

✕
No first-party fan data collected

Live attendance data stays offline. You learn nothing about who showed up or why.

✕
Sponsors can't prove ROI

Brand exposure at events is impossible to quantify, making renewals a hard sell.

✕
Online engagement flatlines post-event

Social buzz peaks inside the stadium and drops to zero within hours.

Each Picture Taken Unlocks Value

Each Fancard bridges the live experience and the digital world — capturing data, generating content, and proving ROI all at once.

Every scan generates
Instant digital fan moments

Fans scan and instantly share a branded Fancard — turning every seat into a social post.

First-party data captured at scale

Every interaction feeds your CRM with opted-in audience profiles and preferences.

Measurable sponsorship proof

Real-time dashboards show reach, impressions, and shares — per sponsor, per event.

Sustained online community growth

Fan-created content keeps your brand circulating long after the final whistle.

How It Works

Easy set up. Instant results.

STEP 1
Create Your Campaign

Design branded templates with your logos, sponsors, and custom themes using our intuitive dashboard.

STEP 2
Launch at Events

Share QR codes at your venue — on screens, tickets, email, social or signage. Fans scan to instantly join. No mobile app needed.

STEP 3
Capture Unique Data

Access engagement metrics, sentiment insights, and data that normally is lost and prove ROI.

STEP 4
Build Your Fan Database

Collect verified fan contact information and build a direct relationship with your most engaged audience.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before your first campaign.

01 What is Fancard and how does it work?

Fancard is a campaign platform that lets sports clubs and event organisers create branded digital cards. Fans scan a QR code at the venue, instantly receive a personalised fancard, and share it online — capturing first-party engagement data at every step.

02 Do fans need to download an app?

No. Fans simply scan a QR code — displayed on screens, signage, tickets, or email — and the experience opens directly in their mobile browser. Zero friction, zero downloads.

03 How quickly can I launch a campaign?

Most teams are live within a single day. Use the intuitive dashboard to design your branded template, upload sponsor logos, and generate a QR code — then deploy at your next event.

04 What data do I collect from fans?

You capture verified first-party data including fan contact details, engagement actions, social shares, and sentiment insights that are otherwise lost after the final whistle.

05 Can I prove ROI to sponsors?

Yes. Fancard provides engagement metrics, reach data, and shareable reports that give sponsors concrete proof of value — making renewals and upsells significantly easier.

06 Is Fancard suitable for smaller clubs or only large organisations?

Fancard is built to scale. Whether you run a grassroots club or a top-flight stadium, the platform adapts to your audience size and budget with flexible campaign options.

Ready to turn fans into reach?

Book a short demo and see Fancard live with your event branding.
